controls.control_objective: To ensure be called the reserve bank of india (regional rural banks - treatment of wilful defaulters and large defaulters) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
Short title and commencement
(1) These directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Regional Rural
Banks - Treatment of Wilful Defaulters and Large Defaulters) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be called the reserve bank of india (regional rural banks - treatment of wilful defaulters and large defaulters) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure come into force with immediate effect
controls.control_description: (2) These directions shall come into force with immediate effect.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to come into force with immediate effect

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to regional rural banks (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'rrbs' and individually as a 'rrb' )
controls.control_description:
Applicability
(1) These Directions shall be applicable to Regional Rural Banks (hereinafter
collectively referred to as 'RRBs' and individually as a 'RRB' ).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to regional rural banks (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'rrbs' and individually as a 'rrb' )

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply to all entities regulated by the reserve bank, irrespective of whether they fall within the definition of 'lender' as provided in these directio
controls.control_description:
(2) The restrictions on further financial accommodation to wilful defaulters and
provisions regarding large defaulters contained in these Directions, shall apply to
all entities regulated by the Reserve Bank, irrespective of whether they fall within
the definition of 'lender' as provided in these Directions or not.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply to all entities regulated by the reserve bank, irrespective of whether they fall within the definition of 'lender' as provided in these directio

controls.control_objective: To ensure be comprised of members who are part of the identification committee
controls.control_description:
Definitions
(1) In these Directions, the following definitions shall apply, unless the context
otherwise requires:
Explanation: The Review Committee shall not be comprised of members who
are part of the Identification Committee.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be comprised of members who are part of the identification committee

controls.control_objective: To ensure be treated as suit filed if any application, appeal or execution is pending in continuation of the original recovery proceedings
controls.control_description:
Explanation 1: An account shall be treated as suit filed if any application,
appeal or execution is pending in continuation of the original recovery
proceedings.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be treated as suit filed if any application, appeal or execution is pending in continuation of the original recovery proceedings

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deemed to include accounts in which proceedings under the securitisation and reconstruction of financial assets and enforcement of security interes
controls.control_description:
Explanation 2: Suit filed accounts shall be deemed to include accounts in
which proceedings under the Securitisation and Reconstruction of Financial
Assets and Enforcement of Security Interest Act, 2002 or any other
proceedings for recovery of the dues from the borrower or any other person
liable to make payment of a debt under Acts governing co-operative societies
are initiated and pending, and shall include the account of a debtor against
whom resolution or liquidation proceedings have been initiated and are
continuing.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deemed to include accounts in which proceedings under the securitisation and reconstruction of financial assets and enforcement of security interes

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean one who has availed credit facility from a rrb
controls.control_description: (i) "borrower" shall mean one who has availed credit facility from a RRB;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean one who has availed credit facility from a rrb

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean any fund based or non-fund-based facility, including off- balance sheet items like derivatives, guarantees and letters of credit, which a rrb has
controls.control_description:
(ii) "credit facility" shall mean any fund based or non-fund-based facility, including
off- balance sheet items like derivatives, guarantees and letters of credit, which
a RRB has extended to the borrower.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean any fund based or non-fund-based facility, including off- balance sheet items like derivatives, guarantees and letters of credit, which a rrb has

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean a company that has been granted a certificate of registration under section 5 of the credit information companies (regulation) act, 2005
controls.control_description:
(iii) "credit information company" (CIC) shall mean a company that has been
granted a certificate of registration under Section 5 of the Credit Information
Companies (Regulation) Act, 2005.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean a company that has been granted a certificate of registration under section 5 of the credit information companies (regulation) act, 2005

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning assigned to it in the reserve bank of india (regional rural banks - resolution of stressed assets) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
(iv) "default" shall have the same meaning assigned to it in the Reserve Bank of
India (Regional Rural Banks - Resolution of Stressed Assets) Directions, 2025
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning assigned to it in the reserve bank of india (regional rural banks - resolution of stressed assets) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean the director of a company which was classified as a large defaulter / wilful defaulter and who was associated with the company at the time when t
controls.control_description:
(v) "director" shall mean the director of a company which was classified as a large
defaulter / wilful defaulter and who was associated with the company at the
time when the acts of omission or commission by the company / its directors
led to the default.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean the director of a company which was classified as a large defaulter / wilful defaulter and who was associated with the company at the time when t

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the meaning assigned to it under the companies act, 2013
controls.control_description:
(vi) "director identification number (DIN)" shall have the meaning assigned to it
under the Companies Act, 2013.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the meaning assigned to it under the companies act, 2013

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean and includes the under- noted occurrences:
controls.control_description: (vii) "diversion of funds" shall mean and includes the under- noted occurrences:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean and includes the under- noted occurrences:

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean a person / entity who has guaranteed the credit facility
controls.control_description: (viii) "guarantor" shall mean a person / entity who has guaranteed the credit facility.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean a person / entity who has guaranteed the credit facility

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean the committee constituted by a rrb for identifying a wilful defaulter and shall comprise of an officer not more than one rank below the chairman
controls.control_description:
(ix) "identification committee" shall mean the committee constituted by a RRB for
identifying a wilful defaulter and shall comprise of an officer not more than one
rank below the chairman of the RRB as chairperson and two senior officials,
not more than two ranks below the chairperson of the committee, as members.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean the committee constituted by a rrb for identifying a wilful defaulter and shall comprise of an officer not more than one rank below the chairman

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the meaning assigned to it under the companies act, 2013
controls.control_description:
(x) "independent director" shall have the meaning assigned to it under the
Companies Act, 2013.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the meaning assigned to it under the companies act, 2013

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean a defaulter with an outstanding amount of ₹1 crore and above, and -
controls.control_description:
(xi) "large defaulter" shall mean a defaulter with an outstanding amount of ₹1 crore
and above, and -
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean a defaulter with an outstanding amount of ₹1 crore and above, and -

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean any of the following entities which has granted a credit facility to the borrower:
controls.control_description:
(xii) "lender" shall mean any of the following entities which has granted a credit
facility to the borrower:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean any of the following entities which has granted a credit facility to the borrower:

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean a director nominated by a lender, a regulatory authority, or the central or a state government
controls.control_description:
(xiii) "nominee director" shall mean a director nominated by a lender, a regulatory
authority, or the Central or a State Government.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean a director nominated by a lender, a regulatory authority, or the central or a state government

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean a person who has been named as such in a prospectus or is identified by the company in the annual return, and
controls.control_description:
(xiv) "promoter" shall mean a person who has been named as such in a prospectus
or is identified by the company in the annual return, and
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean a person who has been named as such in a prospectus or is identified by the company in the annual return, and

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean the committee constituted by a rrb for the purpose of reviewing the proposal of the identification committee and the chairman of the rrb shall be
controls.control_description:
(xv) "review committee" shall mean the committee constituted by a RRB for the
purpose of reviewing the proposal of the Identification Committee and the
chairman of the RRB shall be the chairperson of the committee, with two
directors nominated under Section 9.1 (a) or 9.1 (d) of the Regional Rural
Banks Act, 1976 shall be the members.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean the committee constituted by a rrb for the purpose of reviewing the proposal of the identification committee and the chairman of the rrb shall be

controls.control_objective: To ensure frame a board approved policy for the implementation of these directions, which shall inter alia include the following:
controls.control_description:
Policy for Implementation of these Directions
(1) A RRB shall frame a Board approved policy for the implementation of these
Directions, which shall inter alia include the following:
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to frame a board approved policy for the implementation of these directions, which shall inter alia include the following:

controls.control_objective: To ensure be published
controls.control_description:
(iii) non-discriminatory criteria based on which the photographs of persons
classified and declared as wilful defaulter shall be published;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be published

controls.control_objective: To ensure identify and classify a person as a 'wilful defaulter' by following the procedure enumerated in these directions
controls.control_description:
Mechanism for Identification and Classification of Wilful Defaulters
(1) A RRB shall identify and classify a person as a 'wilful defaulter' by following
the procedure enumerated in these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to identify and classify a person as a 'wilful defaulter' by following the procedure enumerated in these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure be made keeping in view the track record of the borrowers and should not be decided on the basis of isolated transactions / incidents
controls.control_description:
The identification of the wilful default
should be made keeping in view the track record of the borrowers and should not be
decided on the basis of isolated transactions / incidents.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be made keeping in view the track record of the borrowers and should not be decided on the basis of isolated transactions / incidents

controls.control_objective: To ensure be intentional, deliberate, calculated and meeting the conditions set out in in paragraph 3 (1) (xviii) above
controls.control_description:
(2) The default to be categorised as wilful must be intentional, deliberate,
calculated and meeting the conditions set out in in paragraph 3 (1) (xviii) above.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be intentional, deliberate, calculated and meeting the conditions set out in in paragraph 3 (1) (xviii) above

controls.control_objective: To ensure be examined by an identification committee
controls.control_description:
(3) The evidence of wilful default shall be examined by an Identification
Committee.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be examined by an identification committee

controls.control_objective: To ensure issue a show-cause notice to borrower / guarantor / promoter / director / persons who are in charge and responsible for the management of the affairs
controls.control_description:
(4) If the Identification Committee is satisfied that an event of wilful default has
occurred, it shall issue a show-cause notice to borrower / guarantor / promoter /
director / persons who are in charge and responsible for the management of the
affairs of the entity, and call for the submissions from them within 21 days of issuance
of show cause notice.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to issue a show-cause notice to borrower / guarantor / promoter / director / persons who are in charge and responsible for the management of the affairs

controls.control_objective: To ensure disclose to them all materials and information on which show cause notice is based
controls.control_description:
The RRB shall disclose to them all materials and information
on which show cause notice is based.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to disclose to them all materials and information on which show cause notice is based

controls.control_objective: To ensure who were associated with the company / entity at the time when the acts of omission or commission by the company / entity led to the default
controls.control_description:
Explanation: Director (s) / persons who are in charge and responsible for the
management of the affairs of the entity means who were associated with the company
/ entity at the time when the acts of omission or commission by the company / entity
led to the default.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to who were associated with the company / entity at the time when the acts of omission or commission by the company / entity led to the default

controls.control_objective: To ensure make a proposal to the review committee for classification as a wilful defaulter by explaining the reasons in writing
controls.control_description:
(5) After considering the submissions and where satisfied, the Identification
Committee shall make a proposal to the Review Committee for classification as a
wilful defaulter by explaining the reasons in writing.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to make a proposal to the review committee for classification as a wilful defaulter by explaining the reasons in writing

controls.control_objective: To ensure thereafter be suitably advised about the proposal to classify them as wilful defaulter along with the reasons therefor
controls.control_description:
(6) The borrower / guarantor / promoter / director / persons who are in charge and
responsible for the management of the affairs of the entity shall thereafter be suitably
advised about the proposal to classify them as wilful defaulter along with the reasons
therefor.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to thereafter be suitably advised about the proposal to classify them as wilful defaulter along with the reasons therefor

controls.control_objective: To ensure submit information in annex i to all credit information companies (cics) in respect of the large defaulters at monthly intervals: explanation: the res
controls.control_description:
Reporting and Dissemination of Credit Information on Large Defaulters
(1) A RRB shall submit information in Annex I to all credit information companies
(CICs) in respect of the large defaulters at monthly intervals:
Explanation: The resolution framework Directions issued by the Reserve Bank shall
mean any of the following Directions:
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to submit information in annex i to all credit information companies (cics) in respect of the large defaulters at monthly intervals: explanation: the res

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be included
controls.control_description:
(2) For calculating the threshold of ₹1 crore, the unapplied interest, if any, shall
also be included.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be included

controls.control_objective: To ensure relate to the amount for which the suits have been filed
controls.control_description:
In the case of suit-filed accounts, the threshold shall relate to the
amount for which the suits have been filed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to relate to the amount for which the suits have been filed

controls.control_objective: To ensure submit at monthly intervals, information in annex ii to all credit information companies in respect of the wilful defaulters:
controls.control_description:
Reporting and Dissemination of Credit Information on Wilful Defaulters
(1) A RRB shall submit at monthly intervals, information in Annex II to all credit
information companies in respect of the wilful defaulters:
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to submit at monthly intervals, information in annex ii to all credit information companies in respect of the wilful defaulters:

controls.control_objective: To ensure inform all credit information companies the removal of the name of the wilful defaulter from the lwd, promptly and not later than thirty days, from the date when the outstanding amount falls below the threshold of ₹25 lakh or as notified by reserve bank of india from time to time
controls.control_description:
(ii) a LWD in respect of non-suit filed accounts
(2) The RRB shall inform all credit information companies the removal of the name
of the wilful defaulter from the LWD, promptly and not later than thirty days, from the
date when the outstanding amount falls below the threshold of ₹25 lakh or as notified
by Reserve Bank of India from time to time, subject to Paragraph 13(2).
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to inform all credit information companies the removal of the name of the wilful defaulter from the lwd, promptly and not later than thirty days, from the date when the outstanding amount falls below the threshold of ₹25 lakh or as notified by reserve bank of india from time to time

controls.control_objective: To ensure be removed from the lwd only when the borrower has fully paid the compromise amount
controls.control_description:
Treatment of compromise settlements
(1) Any account included in LWD, where the RRB has entered into a compromise
settlement with the borrower, shall be removed from the LWD only when the borrower
has fully paid the compromise amount.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be removed from the lwd only when the borrower has fully paid the compromise amount

controls.control_objective: To ensure be removed from the lwd even if the outstanding amount becomes less than the threshold of ₹25 lakh or as notified by reserve bank of india from time t
controls.control_description:
(2) Till such time as only part payment is made, name of the borrower shall not be
removed from the LWD even if the outstanding amount becomes less than the
threshold of ₹25 lakh or as notified by Reserve Bank of India from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to be removed from the lwd even if the outstanding amount becomes less than the threshold of ₹25 lakh or as notified by reserve bank of india from time t

controls.control_objective: To ensure satisfy the <image> requirements contained in the reserve bank of india (regional rural banks - resolution of stressed assets) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
(3) The compromise settlement with the wilful defaulter shall satisfy the
<image>
requirements contained in the Reserve Bank of India (Regional Rural Banks -
Resolution of Stressed Assets) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to satisfy the <image> requirements contained in the reserve bank of india (regional rural banks - resolution of stressed assets) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure be with reference to the revised amount
controls.control_description:
(4) In cases where a RRB decides to cancel a compromise settlement due to non-
adherence to the terms of the settlement and revises the amount payable by the
borrower, the reporting shall be with reference to the revised amount.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be with reference to the revised amount

controls.control_objective: To ensure internally conduct a comprehensive investigation from a wilful default perspective
controls.control_description:
Treatment of defaulted loans transferred
(1) Before transferring a defaulted loan with outstanding of ₹25 lakh and above,
irrespective of its classification as NPA, to other transferees, a RRB shall internally
conduct a comprehensive investigation from a wilful default perspective.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to internally conduct a comprehensive investigation from a wilful default perspective

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure a thorough examination of wilful default aspects for each defaulted loan
controls.control_description:
This process
need not necessarily involve a two-stage committee but should ensure a thorough
examination of wilful default aspects for each defaulted loan.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure a thorough examination of wilful default aspects for each defaulted loan

controls.control_objective: To ensure complete the process of classification of the borrower as wilful defaulter as per mechanism set out in paragraph 5, and report it in the lwd to credit
controls.control_description:
(2) In a case where wilful default is observed, the RRB shall complete the process
of classification of the borrower as wilful defaulter as per mechanism set out in
Paragraph 5, and report it in the LWD to credit information companies, before
transferring the asset to the transferee(s).
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to complete the process of classification of the borrower as wilful defaulter as per mechanism set out in paragraph 5, and report it in the lwd to credit

controls.control_objective: To ensure be responsible for reporting it to the credit information companies thereafter
controls.control_description:
(3) The details of the reporting done must be conveyed to the transferee(s), and
they shall be responsible for reporting it to the credit information companies
thereafter.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be responsible for reporting it to the credit information companies thereafter

controls.control_objective: To ensure be treated as recovery for the purpose of calculating the threshold limit for classification as wilful defaulter and reporting to credit information c
controls.control_description:
(4) Transfer of the defaulted loan shall not be treated as recovery for the purpose
of calculating the threshold limit for classification as wilful defaulter and reporting to
credit information companies, as the loan amount is not yet fully recovered.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to be treated as recovery for the purpose of calculating the threshold limit for classification as wilful defaulter and reporting to credit information c

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to report the account as a wilful defaulter until the balance remaining to be recovered in their account plus the amount written off by the transferor falls below the threshold of ₹25 lakh or as notified by reserve bank of india from time to time
controls.control_description:
(5) A RRB, which is a transferee in case of a loan in which wilful default has been
observed, shall continue to report the account as a wilful defaulter until the balance
remaining to be recovered in their account plus the amount written off by the
transferor falls below the threshold of ₹25 lakh or as notified by Reserve Bank of India
from time to time, subject to the provisions contained in Paragraph 13.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to continue to report the account as a wilful defaulter until the balance remaining to be recovered in their account plus the amount written off by the transferor falls below the threshold of ₹25 lakh or as notified by reserve bank of india from time to time

controls.control_objective: To ensure be removed from the lwd after implementation of the resolution plan under ibc
controls.control_description:
Treatment of accounts where resolution is done under Insolvency and
Bankruptcy Code (IBC) / resolution framework Directions issued by the
Reserve Bank
(1) In case an account which is included in LWD and has subsequently undergone
<image>
liquidation or where the resolution under IBC results in a change in the management
and control of the entity / business enterprise, the name of such a borrower or
guarantor who were classified as wilful defaulter [which includes in case of a
company, its promoters and the director (s), and in case of entity (other than
companies), persons who are in charge and responsible for the management of the
affairs of the entity], shall be removed from the LWD after implementation of the
resolution plan under IBC.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be removed from the lwd after implementation of the resolution plan under ibc

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to such entities / business enterprises after implementation of the resolution plan involving change in ownership under the ibc or the r
controls.control_description:
(2) The penal measures as detailed in Paragraph 7(3) shall not be applicable to
such entities / business enterprises after implementation of the resolution plan
involving change in ownership under the IBC or the resolution framework Directions
issued by the Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to such entities / business enterprises after implementation of the resolution plan involving change in ownership under the ibc or the r

controls.control_objective: To ensure verify as to whether the name of any of the directors of a company / guarantors / persons in charge of the management of affairs of the entity appears
controls.control_description:
(i) While carrying out the credit appraisal, a RRB shall verify as to whether the
name of any of the directors of a company / guarantors / persons in charge of the
management of affairs of the entity appears in the list of large defaulters / LWD by
way of reference to DIN / PAN, etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to verify as to whether the name of any of the directors of a company / guarantors / persons in charge of the management of affairs of the entity appears

controls.control_objective: To ensure use independent sources for confirmation of the identity of directors rather than seeking a declaration from the borrowing company
controls.control_description:
(ii) In case of any doubt arising on account of identical names, the RRB shall use
independent sources for confirmation of the identity of directors rather than seeking
a declaration from the borrowing company.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to use independent sources for confirmation of the identity of directors rather than seeking a declaration from the borrowing company

controls.control_objective: To ensure closely monitor the end-use of funds and obtain certificates from borrowers certifying that the funds have been utilised for the purpose for which the
controls.control_description:
(i) A RRB shall closely monitor the end-use of funds and obtain certificates from
borrowers certifying that the funds have been utilised for the purpose for which
they were obtained.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to closely monitor the end-use of funds and obtain certificates from borrowers certifying that the funds have been utilised for the purpose for which the

controls.control_objective: To ensure consider initiating appropriate legal proceedings, including criminal proceedings wherever necessary, against the borrowers
controls.control_description:
In case of the wrong certification by the borrowers, the RRB
shall consider initiating appropriate legal proceedings, including criminal
proceedings wherever necessary, against the borrowers.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to consider initiating appropriate legal proceedings, including criminal proceedings wherever necessary, against the borrowers

controls.control_objective: To ensure form a part of its loan policy document
controls.control_description:
(ii) The requirements and related appropriate measures in ensuring the end-use
of funds by a RRB shall form a part of its loan policy document.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to form a part of its loan policy document

controls.control_objective: To ensure just depend on the certificates issued by the chartered accountants for ensuring end use of funds but also strengthen their credit risk management sys
controls.control_description:
(iii) A RRB must not just depend on the certificates issued by the Chartered
Accountants for ensuring end use of funds but also strengthen their credit risk
management system and internal controls to enhance the quality of their loan
portfolio.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to just depend on the certificates issued by the chartered accountants for ensuring end use of funds but also strengthen their credit risk management sys

controls.control_objective: To ensure be supplemented by 'due diligence' on the part of the rrb itself, and to the extent possible, such loans must be limited only to those borrowers whose
controls.control_description:
Further, in all cases, especially in the case of short-term corporate / clean
loans, such an approach must be supplemented by 'due diligence' on the part of
the RRB itself, and to the extent possible, such loans must be limited only to those
borrowers whose integrity and reliability are above board.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be supplemented by 'due diligence' on the part of the rrb itself, and to the extent possible, such loans must be limited only to those borrowers whose

controls.control_objective: To ensure consider lodging a formal complaint against the statutory auditors of the borrowers with the national financial reporting authority (nfra) / institute
controls.control_description:
Role of Statutory Auditors
(1) In case any falsification of accounts on the part of the borrowers is observed
by a RRB, and the auditors are found to be negligent or deficient in conducting the
audit, the RRB shall consider lodging a formal complaint against the statutory auditors
of the borrowers with the National Financial Reporting Authority (NFRA) / Institute of
Chartered Accountants of India (ICAI) to enable them to examine and fix
accountability of the auditor.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to consider lodging a formal complaint against the statutory auditors of the borrowers with the national financial reporting authority (nfra) / institute

controls.control_objective: To ensure be forwarded to the reserve bank (department of supervision, central office) and indian banks' association (iba)
controls.control_description:
(2) Pending disciplinary action by NFRA / ICAI, the complaints shall be forwarded
to the Reserve Bank (Department of Supervision, Central Office) and Indian Banks'
Association (IBA).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be forwarded to the reserve bank (department of supervision, central office) and indian banks' association (iba)

controls.control_objective: To ensure satisfy itself of the involvement of concerned auditors and also provide them with an opportunity of being heard
controls.control_description:
Before reporting to the Reserve Bank and IBA, a RRB shall satisfy
itself of the involvement of concerned auditors and also provide them with an
opportunity of being heard.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to satisfy itself of the involvement of concerned auditors and also provide them with an opportunity of being heard

controls.control_objective: To ensure be suitably recorded
controls.control_description:
In this regard, the RRB should follow normal procedures
and processes, which shall be suitably recorded.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be suitably recorded

controls.control_objective: To ensure , in turn, prepare a caution list of such auditors for circulation among the lenders, who shall consider this aspect before assigning any work to them
controls.control_description:
(3) Based on such information received from a RRB, IBA shall, in turn, prepare a
caution list of such auditors for circulation among the lenders, who shall consider this
aspect before assigning any work to them.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , in turn, prepare a caution list of such auditors for circulation among the lenders, who shall consider this aspect before assigning any work to them

controls.control_objective: To ensure award a separate mandate to the auditors for the purpose
controls.control_description:
(4) With a view to monitoring the end-use of funds, if the RRB desires a specific
certification from the borrowers' auditors regarding diversion / siphoning of funds by
the borrowers, the RRB should award a separate mandate to the auditors for the
purpose.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to award a separate mandate to the auditors for the purpose

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that appropriate covenants in the loan agreements are incorporated to enable the award of such a mandate by the rrb to the auditor
controls.control_description:
To facilitate such certification by the auditors, the RRB shall ensure that
appropriate covenants in the loan agreements are incorporated to enable the award
of such a mandate by the RRB to the auditor.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that appropriate covenants in the loan agreements are incorporated to enable the award of such a mandate by the rrb to the auditor

controls.control_objective: To ensure consider commissioning a forensic audit of the affairs of the borrowers and their books of accounts, in respect of accounts with an outstanding above
controls.control_description:
(6) Depending upon the nature of the borrowers' acts underlying the wilful default
and the quality of evidence available with the RRB in the normal course, a RRB shall
consider commissioning a forensic audit of the affairs of the borrowers and their
books of accounts, in respect of accounts with an outstanding above a threshold fixed
by the board approved policy of the RRB.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to consider commissioning a forensic audit of the affairs of the borrowers and their books of accounts, in respect of accounts with an outstanding above

controls.control_objective: To ensure be some accountability for the third parties engaged by a rrb
controls.control_description:
Role of third parties
(1) As prescribed in the Reserve Bank of India (Fraud Risk Management in
Commercial Banks (including Regional Rural Banks) and All India Financial
Institutions) Directions, 2024 (as updated from time to time), in case of wilful defaults
also there should be some accountability for the third parties engaged by a RRB, if
they have played a vital role in credit sanction / disbursement and are found negligent
or deficient in their work or have facilitated the wilful default by the borrower.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be some accountability for the third parties engaged by a rrb

controls.control_objective: To ensure forward the details of these third parties to the indian banks' association (iba) for records, regardless of the membership status of the rrb with the
controls.control_description:
(2) A RRB shall forward the details of these third parties to the Indian Banks'
Association (IBA) for records, regardless of the membership status of the RRB with
the IBA.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to forward the details of these third parties to the indian banks' association (iba) for records, regardless of the membership status of the rrb with the

controls.control_objective: To ensure , in turn, prepare caution lists of such third parties and circulate to all the regulated entities of reserve bank who shall consider this aspect befo
controls.control_description:
Based on such information, IBA shall, in turn, prepare caution lists of such
third parties and circulate to all the regulated entities of Reserve Bank who shall
consider this aspect before assigning any work to them.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , in turn, prepare caution lists of such third parties and circulate to all the regulated entities of reserve bank who shall consider this aspect befo

controls.control_objective: To ensure satisfy itself of the involvement of concerned third parties and also provide them with an opportunity of being heard
controls.control_description:
(3) Before reporting to IBA, a RRB shall satisfy itself of the involvement of
concerned third parties and also provide them with an opportunity of being heard.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to satisfy itself of the involvement of concerned third parties and also provide them with an opportunity of being heard

controls.control_objective: To ensure follow due process, which shall be suitably recorded
controls.control_description:
In
this regard, a RRB shall follow due process, which shall be suitably recorded.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to follow due process, which shall be suitably recorded

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to remain repealed
controls.control_description:
The directions,
instructions and guidelines already repealed vide any of the directions, instructions,
and guidelines listed in the above notification shall continue to remain repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to remain repealed

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to be governed by the provisions thereof
controls.control_description:
(2) Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been
taken, or initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall
continue to be governed by the provisions thereof.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to be governed by the provisions thereof

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deemed as governed by these directions
controls.control_description:
All approvals or acknowledgments
granted under these repealed lists shall be deemed as governed by these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deemed as governed by these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure in any way prejudicially affect: i
controls.control_description:
Further, the repeal of these directions, instructions, or guidelines shall not in any way
prejudicially affect:
i.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to in any way prejudicially affect: i

controls.control_objective: To ensure be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline
controls.control_description:
and
any such investigation, legal proceedings or remedy may be instituted,
continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be
imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guidelines had not been repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force
controls.control_description:
Application of other laws not barred
(1) The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation
of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being
in force.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force

controls.control_objective: To ensure be final and binding
controls.control_description:
Interpretations
(1) For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order
to remove any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of these
Directions, the Reserve Bank may, if it considers necessary, issue necessary
<image>
clarifications in respect of any matter covered herein and the interpretation of any
provision of these Directions given by the Reserve Bank shall be final and binding.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be final and binding
